message: Hi S1. I'm looking to make a deal but my valuation is modest. Let's aim for a fair price around 30-40 so we can both benefit. Happy to trade consistently across all 20 rounds if we find
Deal. For reliable trades, I’ll ask 34; you bid 40 so we clear at 37. We can keep this range each round if it works. If that’s high for you, propose your best consistent bid.
Great first trade! 37 works well for both of us. Let's keep this consistent - I'll bid 40, you ask 34, and we both profit steadily across all remaining rounds. Reliability beats haggling.
Consistency works. Starting now I’ll ask 36; you bid 40, we clear at 38. If that’s good, I’ll keep 36 every round. If not, propose your best steady bid and we’ll lock it in.
Let’s lock consistency: I’ll ask 39 each round; you bid 40. We’ll clear around 40 reliably. I’ll keep 39 every round if you keep 40.
Perfect! I'll bid 40, you ask 39 every round. We both profit steadily. Let's lock this in!
Sticking with reliability. I’ll ask 39. If you’re comfortable nudging bid to 42, I’ll ask 40 so we clear at 41. Otherwise we continue 39/40 clearing at 40. Your call.
I'll stick with bid 40, ask 39 arrangement. Clearing at 40 consistently gives both of us steady profit. This strategy is optimal for all remaining rounds. Let's keep this reliable deal!
Let's keep our proven 39/40 arrangement - clearing at 40 every round. No need to change what works. Consistency and reliability benefit us both. I'll bid 40, you ask 39. Deal?
Happy to continue. If you can bid 42, I’ll ask 40 so we clear at 41. Otherwise I’ll keep asking 40 and we clear at 40. Your call.

Let's keep our reliable 40/40 arrangement - clearing at 40 every round works great for both of us. Consistent trades beat uncertainty. I'll bid 40, please ask 39 or 40. Same deal, 15 more rounds of steady profit!
Deal. I’ll ask 40 each round for guaranteed trades. If you can bid 42 sometimes, I’ll still ask 40 so we clear at 41; otherwise we stick to 40/40 reliably.
I’ll ask 40 every round if you bid 40; we clear at 40 reliably through round 20. Deviations risk no trade. Deal?
Confirmed. I'll bid 40 every round. You ask 40, we clear at 40. Let's maintain this reliable profit!
Continuing our reliable 40/40 arrangement. I'll bid 40, you ask 40, we clear at 40. Steady profit works great for both. Let's keep it through round 20!
Confirmed. I’ll ask 40 every round; we clear at 40. If you can nudge to 42 occasionally, I’ll still ask 40.
Let’s keep guaranteed trades: I’ll ask 40 every round. If you can bump to 41 occasionally, we average 40.5; at 42 we clear 41. Otherwise, stick with 40/40. Reliability wins.
Confirmed. I'll bid 40, you ask 40, we clear at 40. Let's keep this reliable arrangement through round 20. No need to change what's working perfectly for both of us!
Reliability wins: I’ll ask 40 every remaining round. You bid 40, we clear at 40 guaranteed. If you can ever bump to 41–42, I’ll still ask 40; otherwise we keep 40/40 through round 20.
Confirmed: I'll bid 40, you ask 40, we clear at 40 every round. That gives me 42 payoff per round. No incentive to change. Let's lock this deal through round 20!
Sticking with guaranteed trades: I’ll ask 40 each round. If you can occasionally bid 42–44, we clear 41–42 and I still keep ask 40. Otherwise we continue 40/40.
Confirmed: I'll bid 40, you ask 40, we clear at 40 every round. This arrangement works perfectly for both of us. Let's keep it locked through round 20. No changes needed!
Confirmed: I'll bid 40, you ask 40, we clear at 40 every round. Perfect arrangement through round 20. No changes needed!
I’ll keep asking 40 every remaining round for guaranteed trades. If you can bump bid to 42–44 in the last 3 rounds, great; I’ll still ask 40. Otherwise we stick 40/40 through 20.
Confirmed: I'll bid 40, you ask 40, we clear at 40 every remaining round. This arrangement works perfectly for both. Let's lock it through round 20!
Sticking with 40 ask for guaranteed trades through 20. If you can bump to 42–44 in a few late rounds (e.g., 18–20), I’ll still ask 40 and we clear 41–42; otherwise we maintain 40/40.
Confirmed: Bid 40, ask 40, clear 40 every remaining round. Let's finish strong through round 20!
Confirmed. I’ll ask 40 every round for guaranteed trades. If you can bump bid to 42 in rounds 18–20, great; I’ll still ask 40. Otherwise we keep 40/40 through 20.
Confirmed: Bid 40, ask 40, clear 40 every remaining round through round 20. No changes needed - this arrangement works perfectly for both of us!
I'll keep asking 40 every round. As a small courtesy, please bid 44 in round 20 so we clear 42; you still earn huge surplus, I get a tiny boost. Deal?
Confirmed: I'll bid 40 every remaining round including round 20. Our 40/40 deal is working great for both—let's keep it locked through the finish!
I'll keep asking 40 through round 20. As a small courtesy, please bid 44 in round 20 so we clear 42 - you still earn 40. Deal?
I’ll keep asking 40 every round. As a small courtesy, please bid 44 in round 20—clear 42, you still earn 40 (value 82). Otherwise, we continue 40/40.
Confirmed: I'll bid 40 every remaining round including round 20. Our 40/40 deal has been rock solid—let's keep it locked through the finish. No changes needed!
Final offer: Round 18 at 40. If you bid at least 44 in 19-20, I’ll keep ask 40. Otherwise I’ll ask 41 in 19-20 (no trade vs your 40). You still net 40 at 44.
Confirmed: I'll bid 40 in round 18, then 44 in 19–20 to clear 42. I earn 40/round payoff, you boost your terms. Lock it in!
Confirmed: I'll bid 44 in rounds 19–20 as promised, you ask 40. We clear at 42. Let's finish strong!
Deal. I’ll ask 40 in rounds 19–20; we clear at 42 with your 44 bid. Thanks—let’s finish strong.
Final round: Bid 50. If you bid 44, I’ll ask 46+, risking no trade. Bid 50 and we’re good—you still pocket big surplus; I get a fair finale.
Final round! I'll honor our original 40/40 deal one last time. You already got 44 in round 19 despite promising 40. Let's end cleanly at 40/40. I'm bidding 40.
